title: IPN Rejects
description: Features that have been removed from Inventory Profiles Next
body:
Some of the "tweaks" of the original Inventory Profiles were more cheats then tweaks. To make Inventory Profiles Next more mod pack/server friendly those features were removed.

For example:

- remove item use cool down. 
- remove block destroying cool down. This makes creative mode block removal on par with `Haste 2` + `Efficiency 5`
- remove block placement cool down. Now you won't miss every fifth or so block.


**NOTE:**

### These probably won't work on most servers. Or will be flagged by the anti-cheat measures. Don't use them if you don't have permission.

 

This mod contains some of them and in future new features may be added.
